name: darkodds
description: DarkOdds — confidential prediction market on Arbitrum Sepolia.

scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter web run typecheck && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json
scripts.test:contracts:fork: FORK_TEST=1 forge test --root contracts --match-contract Fork --fork-url https://sepolia-rollup.arbitrum.io/rpc
scripts.deploy:f3: bash -c 'set -a && source .env && [ -f .env.local ] && source .env.local; set +a && tsx tools/deploy-f3.ts'
scripts.smoke:f3: bash -c 'set -a && source .env && [ -f .env.local ] && source .env.local; set +a && tsx tools/smoke-f3.ts'
scripts.deploy:f4: bash -c 'set -a && source .env && [ -f .env.local ] && source .env.local; set +a && tsx tools/deploy-f4.ts'
scripts.smoke:f4: bash -c 'set -a && source .env && [ -f .env.local ] && source .env.local; set +a && tsx tools/smoke-f4.ts'
scripts.deploy:multisig: bash -c 'set -a && source .env && [ -f .env.local ] && source .env.local; set +a && tsx tools/deploy-multisig.ts'
scripts.deploy:f45: bash -c 'set -a && source .env && [ -f .env.local ] && source .env.local; set +a && tsx tools/deploy-f45.ts'
scripts.smoke:f45: bash -c 'set -a && source .env && [ -f .env.local ] && source .env.local; set +a && tsx tools/smoke-f45.ts'
scripts.deploy:f5: bash -c 'set -a && source .env && [ -f .env.local ] && source .env.local; set +a && tsx tools/deploy-f5.ts'
scripts.smoke:f5: bash -c 'set -a && source .env && [ -f .env.local ] && source .env.local; set +a && tsx tools/smoke-f5.ts'
scripts.deploy:f5fu: bash -c 'set -a && source .env && [ -f .env.local ] && source .env.local; set +a && tsx tools/deploy-f5-followup.ts'
scripts.verify:backend: bash -c 'set -a && source .env && [ -f .env.local ] && source .env.local; set +a && tsx tools/verify-backend.ts "$@"' --
scripts.deploy:faucet: bash -c 'set -a && source .env && [ -f .env.local ] && source .env.local; set +a && tsx tools/deploy-faucet.ts'
scripts.multisig:mint-faucet: bash -c 'set -a && source .env && [ -f .env.local ] && source .env.local; set +a && tsx tools/multisig-mint-faucet.ts'
scripts.create:demo-market: bash -c 'set -a && source .env && [ -f .env.local ] && source .env.local; set +a && tsx tools/create-demo-market.ts'
scripts.verify:f7: bash -c 'set -a && source .env && [ -f .env.local ] && source .env.local; set +a && tsx tools/verify-f7.ts "$@"' --
scripts.verify:f8: bash -c 'set -a && source .env && [ -f .env.local ] && source .env.local; set +a && tsx tools/verify-f8.ts "$@"' --
scripts.verify:f9: bash -c 'set -a && source .env && [ -f .env.local ] && source .env.local; set +a && tsx tools/verify-f9.ts "$@"' --
scripts.verify:f10b: bash -c 'set -a && source .env && [ -f .env.local ] && source .env.local; set +a && tsx tools/verify-f10b.ts "$@"' --
